creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #2)

Please give me a bit more time to review patches in the future. As you know most of us (me included) are volunteers and have many things on our table both inside and outside FreeBSD.

As you can read in the porter handbook, maintainer timeout is at least 2 weeks: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-maintainer . This PR was created 2 days ago only.

Anyway, if you tested the change and nobody reports any breakage, I do not ask you to revert it. Just please consider to submit it upstream too.

Thanks.
